BackupView.ModeDescription:
File-level: copies selected folders and files (requires a readable file system).
Raw image: sector-by-sector copy (for BitLocker, unknown FS, maximum fidelity).
VHDx image: dynamic VHDx — mountable on Windows and Linux, grows only as data is written.
